history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A graphic advertisement-style image shows two uniformed men standing in front of a white background with bold red and blue text.

Main Subject:
Two men in dark collared uniforms stand side by side, facing forward. Both men have their arms positioned so the man on the left has his arms folded across his chest, while the man on the right has his arms at his sides. Each wears a dark cap with a small emblem and a black uniform with light-colored patches and text on the chest area.

Setting:
The background is plain white with no visible environment beyond the design elements. The image appears to be a studio graphic or promotional layout rather than a real outdoor or indoor scene.

Visual Details:
The lighting is even and flat, typical of a promotional graphic. Text and logos are centered toward the top and middle of the image, with red and blue lettering. The top center includes a red oval emblem containing a white star-like symbol, followed by large red text “RAPIO” with smaller blue text beneath it. In the middle center, large red text reads “RAPA & PI00” with “RAPA” above the “&” symbol and “PI00” below. The men occupy the left and right sides of the composition, leaving the text largely in the center.

Visible Text:
RAPIO
Revs your Heart
SEMAKIN DI DEPAN
RAPA & PI00

Practical Summary:
The image is a promotional graphic featuring two men in matching dark uniforms. It displays centered red and blue branding text on a white background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
Gambar tersebut menampilkan dua pembalap pria mengenakan seragam tim balap mereka. Di latar belakang, terdapat logo Yamaha dengan tulisan "RAPIO", "Revs your Heart", dan "SEMAKIN DI DEPAN". Di tengah gambar, terdapat tulisan besar "RAPA & PIOO". Tidak ada konten yang tidak pantas atau eksplisit dalam gambar ini.
